title: Focus Input
description: Use the useRef hook to create a reference to an input element and focus it programmatically.
problemStatement:
Direct access! Use `useRef` to target an `<input>` element. Add a button that, when clicked, automatically focuses the input using the `.focus()` method.

**Requirement:** Assign the ref to the `ref` prop of the input.
hints: Refs provide a way to access DOM nodes without triggering re-renders.
expectedOutput: A button that puts the cursor into a text input field
